problem id: dcad18e9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00100110 -> 00000010
  11000010 -> 00001100
  01010111 -> 10000101
  00101100 -> 00000010
  11100010 -> 00001110
  00010100 -> 00000001
  00101011 -> 10000010
  10001110 -> 00001000
  11111001 -> 10001111

query: 01111100
predicted answer: 00000111
